title: 7 Signs You're Chasing a Wife More Than You're Chasing God
caption:
7 Signs You're Chasing a Wife More Than You're Chasing God (and what it costs you before you notice)

You pray more about her than about your sin. Your quiet time started losing to her replies. You'd change your theology before you'd change your loneliness.

None of that is a character flaw. It's just the order flipped, and the order is the whole game.

1 Corinthians 7 calls undivided devotion to God a gift, not a waiting room. The guy chasing God first isn't ignoring the desire for a wife. He's just not letting it run him.

Fix the order before you fix the loneliness.

Save this and be honest about which one's actually first.

#faith #singleness #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
